home.heroSubtitle: Explore the world's largest caves in Phong Nha - Ke Bang National Park, Vietnam

tulan.name: Tu Lan Encounter
tulan.desc: A very enjoyable 2-Day tour where you get to take a plunge into some of Vietnam's top river caves, based inside the mesmerizing Tu Lan Cave System.

hangtien.name: Hang Tien Endeavour
hangtien.desc: A moderate tour where you will trek, enjoy a natural pool and camp overnight, while exploring the largest dry cave of the Tu Lan Cave System - Hang Tien.

sondoong.name: Son Doong Expedition
sondoong.desc: Son Doong Cave is the largest cave on Earth, with its own eco-system and is embellished with gigantic formations. The Son Doong Expedition is truly the adventure of a lifetime.

hangen.name: Hang En Adventure
hangen.desc: Trek through pristine jungle, visit a minority village, and camp on a sandy beach inside the third largest cave in the world.

safety.title: Safety First
safety.desc: International safety standards with highly trained professional guides.

conservation.title: Conservation
conservation.desc: Committed to preserving the delicate ecosystems of the caves.

community.title: Local Community
community.desc: Providing sustainable jobs and supporting local development.

experience.title: Unique Experience
experience.desc: Exclusive access to the most spectacular caves in the world.

1.text: "The Son Doong Expedition was life-changing. The sheer scale of the caves is incomprehensible until you are standing inside them. The organizing team was incredibly professional."
1.author: Sarah Jenkins

2.text: "We did the Tu Lan Encounter and it was the perfect mix of trekking, swimming, and caving. The food prepared by the porters was the best we had in Vietnam!"
2.author: Mark Davidson

mediaSection.title: Oxalis on global media
mediaSection.desc: For years, Oxalis has been dedicated to showcasing the breathtaking cave systems of Phong Nha-Ke Bang and Tu Lan to a global audience. We are proud that our commitment to sharing Vietnam's natural wonders has been recognized and featured by leading international travel publications.

contact.title: Ready for an Adventure?
contact.subtitle: Get in touch with our travel experts to plan your expedition.
contact.name: Full Name
contact.successMessage: Thank you for reaching out! We will contact you soon.

footer.about: Oxalis Adventure is the sole operator of tours to Son Doong Cave, the world's largest cave. We specialize in providing jungle trek and cave exploration tours.
footer.address: Phong Nha, Bo Trach, Quang Binh, Vietnam
